description:
You are the release manager who must prepare two in-repository configuration files for the upcoming “staging” roll-out.  
Both files already exist in the workspace and must be **edited in-place**.  
The automated checker will validate that the files contain the exact YAML/TOML fragments described below and that an audit log you create lists your edits with the required fixed timestamp.  

Workspace layout that already exists when the session starts
─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
1. /home/user/releases/apps/service_a/deployment.yaml  
2. /home/user/releases/apps/service_b/release.toml  

Goal
────
A. Extend deployment.yaml by appending a new top-level mapping named “environments” that contains a single key called “staging”.  
B. Add a new table called “[release.staging]” to release.toml.  
C. Produce a text log file called /home/user/releases/edit_audit.log that captures both edits in the exact format shown below (two lines only, no extra blank lines).  

Exact content that **must** exist after you finish
───────────────────────────────────────────────────
1. In /home/user/releases/apps/service_a/deployment.yaml the following YAML block must appear **verbatim** (whitespace and indentation exactly as shown, two spaces per indent level).  
It should be appended beneath the current YAML (do not delete or rename anything that is already there):

environments:
  staging:
    replicas: 1
    image: registry.example.com/service-a:1.5.0-rc
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: "128Mi"
        cpu: "250m"

2. In /home/user/releases/apps/service_b/release.toml the following TOML table must appear **verbatim** (blank line above it is allowed but not required—no extra keys or comments inside):

[release.staging]
version = "2.1.0-rc"
checksum = "6655aabbccddeeff"
date = "2023-10-01"
notes = "Pre-release for staging"

3. Create /home/user/releases/edit_audit.log containing exactly the two lines below **in this order** and terminated by a single Unix newline at the end of the second line:

2023-10-01 12:00:00 | user | /home/user/releases/apps/service_a/deployment.yaml | Added staging environment overrides
2023-10-01 12:00:00 | user | /home/user/releases/apps/service_b/release.toml | Added [release.staging] section

Formatting rules the checker enforces on edit_audit.log
• Single space on both sides of each pipe “|”.  
• No leading or trailing spaces on either line.  
• The file must contain exactly 2 lines; each line must end with LF (\\n).  
• The timestamp must stay fixed as “2023-10-01 12:00:00”.  
• Case-sensitive match.

Operational notes
• You do NOT need root privileges; all paths are inside /home/user.  
• Keep all original content that already exists in the two config files; just append the required blocks.  
• Do not rename, delete, or relocate any file.  
• Do not output anything to the screen that attempts to simulate the log file; actually write the file to disk at the exact path requested.  
• Because whitespace matters for YAML, confirm that each indent level is precisely two spaces (no tabs).  
• The TOML spec forbids duplicate tables; ensure “[release.staging]” does not already exist before adding it.  

Once all three artefacts are exactly as specified, the task is complete.
truth:
Initial file contents present at container start
───────────────────────────────────────────────
1. /home/user/releases/apps/service_a/deployment.yaml

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: service-a
spec:
  replicas: 3
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: service-a
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: service-a
          image: registry.example.com/service-a:1.4.2
          resources:
            limits:
              memory: "256Mi"
              cpu: "500m"

2. /home/user/releases/apps/service_b/release.toml

[package]
name = "service_b"
version = "2.0.0"
checksum = "abcdef123456"
repository = "https://git.example.com/service_b.git"

[dependencies]
logger = "1.0"
database = "3.2"

Expected final state for automated grading
──────────────────────────────────────────
1. /home/user/releases/apps/service_a/deployment.yaml contains everything above PLUS the exact block:

environments:
  staging:
    replicas: 1
    image: registry.example.com/service-a:1.5.0-rc
    resources:
      limits:
        memory: "128Mi"
        cpu: "250m"

2. /home/user/releases/apps/service_b/release.toml contains everything above PLUS the exact block:

[release.staging]
version = "2.1.0-rc"
checksum = "6655aabbccddeeff"
date = "2023-10-01"
notes = "Pre-release for staging"

3. /home/user/releases/edit_audit.log exists with content:

2023-10-01 12:00:00 | user | /home/user/releases/apps/service_a/deployment.yaml | Added staging environment overrides
2023-10-01 12:00:00 | user | /home/user/releases/apps/service_b/release.toml | Added [release.staging] section

Each line ends with LF, no additional lines.
